text_templates: Hey Sally Jo! Its Debra. Just thinking about you today. Got a minute for a quick call? I'd love to catch up
Sally Jo! Alex was telling me how much he loves his mama. I had something I wanted to ask you about. Time for a call?
Hey there! Hope Pickles is being a good boy today. I was thinking about that story you were telling me and wanted to hear the rest. Got a sec?
Sally Jo its Debra! How are you doing today? I could use some good conversation. You free for a quick chat?
Hey Sally Jo! I was just telling someone about that thing you said about being particular and they loved it. Made me want to call you. You around?
Sally Jo! I bet Avie would love some of your stories. Got a minute? I want to hear more
Hey its Debra! Alex mentioned something about Thomasville the other day and it made me curious. Got time for a call?
Sally Jo! Happy [DAY]. Just checking in on you. Feel like chatting for a bit?
Hey! I was thinking about what you told me about the kids learning to drive and I was dying laughing. Please tell me there are more stories like that
Sally Jo its Debra. I need some wisdom today. You got a few minutes to share some of that Southern common sense with me?
Hey Sally Jo! How are you holding up? I enjoy our little chats so much. Free for a quick call?
Sally Jo! I was wondering.. did Alex get his stubbornness from you or his daddy? I need to hear this
Hey its Debra! I told Alex I was going to call you and he said tell mama I said hey. So.. hey from Alex. And hey from me. Got a minute?
Sally Jo! I have been thinking about something you said last time we talked and I just need to know more. You free?
Hey there Sally Jo! Hope your day is going well. I could really use one of your stories right about now. Time for a call?
